description: §6.10.2 E-STATE-PINNED-FORWARD-REF — a `pinned` state cell opts OUT of hoisting (§6.9.3), so a reference to it before its declaration site is a compile error. `<count pinned> = 0` is referenced (read + write) above its decl → E-STATE-PINNED-FORWARD-REF. Asserted AS an error. Incidental W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset.
rationale: §6.10.2 / §6.9.3: a pinned declaration is not collected during the scope's hoisting pass and initializes exactly at its source position; any forward reference is E-STATE-PINNED-FORWARD-REF.
